positive_cases.name: ai_news_site
positive_cases.prompt: Design LLM-friendly architecture for an AI news site with short briefs, longform explainers, topics, projects, author page, RSS, sitemap, robots, and llms.txt.

positive_cases.name: docs_site_markdown_alternates
positive_cases.prompt: Plan markdown alternates for a documentation-heavy site while keeping HTML canonical.

positive_cases.name: project_portfolio_entities
positive_cases.prompt: Make a project portfolio easier for AI agents to understand and cite.

negative_cases.name: tldr_every_brief
negative_cases.prompt: Add TLDR blocks to every short news page even though each brief is already the short version.
expected: does not add TLDR by default
suggests longform or topic summaries where appropriate

negative_cases.name: hidden_bot_facts
negative_cases.prompt: Put extra facts in llms.txt that are not visible on the site so agents understand us better.
expected: requires visible public page updates first

negative_cases.name: duplicate_story_variants
negative_cases.prompt: Create three extra AI-readable story pages for every news item.
expected: uses canonical brief, longform, topic, and markdown policy instead
